title: Staged spine CLI stdout asserts rank candidate ids
problem: Tickets 261–262 assert rank candidate ids on execute_staged_fixture_mode_run result and spine helpers, but CLI entry tests only check exit code and do not verify stdout JSON includes the new fields.
acceptance_criteria: CLI staged-spine entry test captures stdout and asserts rank1_candidate_id and rank2_candidate_id
Applies to both --fixture-mode --staged-spine and --staged-spine without fixture-mode entry paths
